page_content:
MEES670 Conservation Biology (3 Credits)

Conservation in the Anthropocene means conserving biodiversity

and ecosystem function in the midst of climate change, habitat loss, overexploitation, altered nutrient cycling, and invasive species with protected areas and reserve networks, ecosystem restoration, and other biodiversity conservation and management schemes.Cross-listed with CONS670.

Credit Only Granted for. CONS670 or MEES670.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
